package_description: Variable-speed drive (VSD) retrofit on gas compressor drivers and waste-heat recovery integration at onshore processing plants. VSDs allow compressors to run at load-matched speeds rather than full speed, reducing fuel gas consumption by 8-12%. Heat recovery captures turbine exhaust heat for process duties. Applicable to onshore compressor stations in conventional, LDAR, and renewable-diesel states.
rollout_limit_notes: Indicative national adoption bound reflecting station-by-station retrofit cycle (major turnaround every 5-7 years) and capital allocation within declining gas production portfolio.
evidence_summary: Santos and Woodside compressor upgrade programmes report 8-14% gas fuel reduction on retrofitted stations. IEA Natural Gas Decarbonisation 2022 cites 10% central estimate for VSD retrofit on compression. Heat integration adds 2-3%.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis: incumbent states calibrated to AES 2023-24 Table F and NGGI 2023-24 data; efficiency package evidence from Australian upstream operator disclosures and IEA technology assessment.
review_notes: Electric compression and integrated states excluded — they replace gas turbines rather than improving them. Non-stacking with autonomous gas turbine drift track to avoid double-counting.

package_description: Solar PV panels with lithium-ion battery storage replace diesel generators at remote wellsites and field gathering compressor stations. Solar replaces 25-40% of diesel generation load at sites with >5.0 kWh/m2/day irradiance (most of WA inland, QLD CSG, NT). Applicable to conventional and LDAR states where diesel remains the primary wellsite power source.
rollout_limit_notes: Indicative national adoption bound reflecting remote-site logistics, CAPEX allocation, and the limited share of total diesel that is at solar-accessible remote wellsites (vs drilling rigs and LNG facilities that are not suited to solar).
evidence_summary: ARENA-funded solar-diesel hybrid projects at Australian remote mining sites demonstrate 20-40% diesel displacement. QLD Department of Energy: CSG wellpad solar hybrid pilots (Santos, Origin). Solar irradiance data from BOM Atlas of Australian Solar Energy.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis: incumbent states calibrated to AES 2023-24 Table F and NGGI 2023-24 data; efficiency package evidence from ARENA project reports and BOM solar data.
review_notes: Applies only to states where diesel remains dominant at remote wellsites. Renewable-diesel and integrated states excluded — their coefficients already embed explicit solar-diesel reduction trajectory. Non-stacking with background diesel drift track.

package_description: SCADA-integrated load management for electric motor drive compressors: dynamic power setpoint scheduling, peak-demand shaving, and grid demand-response participation. Reduces net electricity consumption by ~5% through optimised compressor scheduling and demand charges. Applicable to electric compression and integrated low-emission states.
rollout_limit_notes: Indicative national adoption bound reflecting SCADA integration readiness and grid demand-response programme coverage at Australian gas processing facilities.
evidence_summary: ABB and Siemens smart-load SCADA systems for industrial compressor stations report 4-7% electricity reduction via demand optimisation. 5% central estimate used; conservative given 24/7 baseload nature of gas compression.
derivation_method: Hybrid synthesis: incumbent states calibrated to AES 2023-24 Table F and NGGI 2023-24 data; efficiency package evidence from ABB/Siemens industrial publications and ARENA smart grid project reports.
review_notes: Applies only to states with significant electric drive loads. Conventional, LDAR-only, and renewable-diesel states excluded. Non-stacking with background diesel drift track.
